sglang.title: Support Eagle2 for Triton backend
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Support Eagle2 for Triton backend and achieve 2.6x speedup on batch size 1 for no cuda graph setting. (Based on #3317, #3309, #3292)
CUDA graph will be supported in follow-up PR.
python3 -m sglang.launch_server --model meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-chat-hf --disable-radix --disable-cuda-graph --a

sglang.title: [Feat] return hidden states
sglang.author: Jackmin801
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR intends to add the return_hidden_states argument to ServerArgs which makes the results contain the last layer hidden states in output["meta_info"]["hidden_states"].
These hidden states are useful for example for verifying computations. (e.g. https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.16007)
Modif

vllm.title: [misc] Add retries with exponential backoff for HF file existence check
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: file_exists usually timeout on CI causing jobs to fail. This is to add retry policy with exponential backoff to hopefully get requests to HF to go through

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Clean up and fix multi-modal processors
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix multi-modal processor tests only testing up to limit - 1 rather than limit data items, resulting in multi-modal inputs being skipped entirely for single-image models.
Remove outdated workaround for Qwen2-VL processing odd number of video frames.
Avoid using hardcoded values in Qwen-VL and GLM-4V

vllm.title: Fix seed parameter behavior in vLLM
vllm.author: SmartManoj
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #11953
Update the seed_everything method to handle seed=None appropriately.

Modify vllm/platforms/interface.py to update the seed_everything method to handle seed=None and skip setting random seeds if seed=None.
Add a new test file tests/test_seed_behavior.py to verify the behavior of the see

vllm.title: [Model] Ultravox Model: Support v0.5 Release
vllm.author: farzadab
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Hi there!
We (cc @petersalas) are preparing for the v0.5 release of Ultravox audio/text to text model. This release does some minor adjustments to the architecture (moves a layer norm before the last layer of the projector).
The previous versions are still supported through the config parameter proj

vllm.title: [misc] Fix setup.py condition to avoid AMD from being mistaken with CPU
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: AMD build job started failing after #12874 was merged, probably due to the new elif condition that leads AMD to fall into it and start looking for +cpu version. This is to revert that commit.

vllm.title: [V1][Minor] Move scheduler outputs to a separate file
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Minor code re-organization + Add some comments on SchedulerOutput.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Support missing tool parameters in mistral tokenizer
vllm.author: fgreinacher
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The Mistral schema is a bit more restrictive and does not accept
functions without parameter dictionary. This is no problem with the
OpenAI schema though, so the Mistral tokenizer should adapt the request
before passing it on.
This is how it's currently failing:
INFO:     172.18.0.8:60210 - "POST /v

vllm.title: [Benchmark] Add BurstGPT to benchmark_serving
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds the BurstGPT dataset to benchmark_serving.py. Compared to ShareGPT (single-turn), BurstGPT contains longer prompts (avg. 763 tokens) and outputs (avg. 348 tokens). This PR doesn't use the timestamps in the dataset yet.
*The dataset only contains the lengths of the prompt and output. It

vllm.title: [Core] Don't do platform detection at import time
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Running just vllm or vllm --version or something similar resulted
in several lines of log noise about platform detection. This is because
several places were triggering this to occur at import time by doing the
following:
from vllm.platforms import current_platform
Platform detection runs the first

vllm.title: [Misc] LoRA - Refactor Punica ops tests
vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Cleanup/Refactor punica kernel tests - No functional change.
Specifically, merge tests/lora/test_punica_ops_sizes.py and tests/lora/test_punica_ops_variation.py into a single file.

vllm.title: [Bugfix]: Reasoning output bug according to the chat template change
vllm.author: gaocegege
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
DeepSeek updated the chat template yesterday: link.
They added the <think> token to the chat template, indicating that the first section represents the thinking process and won't output <think> in the final output. This PR aims to address the reasoning parser implementation.
